title: AgIS Agent Card
description: EXPERIMENTAL. Defines the structure of an AgIS Agent Card — the self-describing identity document for an AI agent. Schema is aligned with AgIS SDK v0.3.0-alpha.0 test vectors.

agent_id.description: Globally unique agent identifier, typically in agent://domain/path format.

issuer.description: Entity that issued this agent card.

issued_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this agent card was issued.

expires_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this agent card expires.

public_keys.description: One or more public keys associated with this agent.

id.description: Key identifier, typically a JWK thumbprint.

capabilities.description: Optional list of declared agent capabilities.

metadata.description: Optional free-form metadata about the agent.

signature.description: JWS-style signature over the canonical form of this agent card.

type.description: Both uppercase 'JWS' and lowercase 'jws' are accepted for alpha compatibility.

value.description: Base64url-encoded JWS compact or detached signature.
